classes.reasoning: Document explicitly identifies itself as 'INTERIM CLINICAL STUDY REPORT' in the title and footer, with CSR-002 designation. Contains full clinical study report structure including synopsis, efficacy/safety findings, data cut-off dates, and DSMB review conclusions typical of a regulatory CSR document.

trial_title: Phase II Study of BRC-471 in EGFR-Mutant NSCLC Post-Osimertinib
summary: This is an interim clinical study report (CSR-002) for protocol BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, covering Stage 1 completion of a Simon two-stage Phase II study of BRC-471 in EGFR-mutant NSCLC patients following osimertinib treatment. The report includes efficacy and safety data from 67 enrolled patients with a data cut-off of September 1, 2023, demonstrating that the pre-specified Stage 1 response criterion was met (29% ORR), allowing the study to proceed to Stage 2 enrollment.
